parsed.answer: The Claude Code input area is a terminal-based prompt. It displays a prompt symbol (the '❯' character, a heavy right-pointing angle quotation mark ornament) followed by a cursor. The cursor is a standard terminal block or underline cursor. Multiline input is supported: pressing Shift+Enter inserts a newline without submitting. The input area is at the bottom of the terminal screen. There is contextual status information near the input area.

claims.statement: Shift+Enter inserts a newline without submitting
The input area expands vertically for multiline input
The input area is positioned at the bottom of the terminal screen
There is contextual status information near the input area
The cursor is a standard terminal cursor
